text.title: Diagram-as-Code with Mermaid / Structurizr Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Diagram-as-Code with Mermaid / Structurizr end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: inventory
step.action: List every diagram referenced from in-repo docs; capture type + intended C4 level.

step.name: convert
step.action: Re-author each as Mermaid or Structurizr DSL; commit source files.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add render step to CI; fail PR on render error.

step.name: relink-docs
step.action: Replace embeds with text references to source paths; add alt text to any embeds left.

step.name: emit-artefact
step.action: Record diagrams + render_command + ci_check in artefact JSON.
